name: Leftover Beef Miroton
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice onions and brown in fat.
2. Add flour and brown.
3. Add vinegar, bouillon (or water), and tomato juice.
4. Cook together until slightly thickened, stirring constantly.
5. Season with salt and pepper.
6. Simmer sliced or cubed beef in the sauce for a few minutes.
7. Pour into a baking dish, sprinkle with bread crumbs, and bake at 400°F for 10 minutes.
